title: Jumnye
description: Jumnye – A Minecraft mod that introduces new potions, ores, tools, mobs, and structures, enhancing exploration and gameplay with fresh content.
body:
**What is Jumnye?**

Jumnye is an expansive Minecraft mod designed to enrich your gameplay experience by adding a variety of new elements. Players can look forward to discovering unique mobs, ores, tools, potions, bosses, and even music discs, all carefully integrated into the Minecraft world to provide new challenges and rewards.

### 🛠️ Beta State Notice
The mod is currently in beta development. If you encounter any bugs or issues, please report them on our Discord server: https://discord.gg/wBysnXxbCU.


### 📖 About the Mod
The Jumnye mod offers a comprehensive expansion to your Minecraft adventure:

New Mobs: Encounter fresh and exciting creatures in various biomes, each with their own unique behavior and drops.
Ores & Tools: Discover new ores that unlock powerful crafting materials, allowing you to create stronger tools and equipment.
Potions: Brew custom potions that introduce new effects to give you an edge in combat or exploration.
Bosses: Face off against formidable new bosses, each with their own mechanics and challenges to test your skills.
Music Discs: Collect brand-new music discs with original tunes to enhance your Minecraft world’s atmosphere.
